title: Enxorbytes Various Vanities
description: Adds 20 new vanity sets with various theming.
body:
# Enxorbytes Various Vanities

This is a pack for [Vanity](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity-core), it adds 20 Vanity sets (including LGBT themed sets). These sets can be obtained via trading with the Stylist Villager or crafting them.

### REQUIRED
- [Vanity](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity-core)

### Current Designs added
- Aurora
- Chlorophyll
- Cinnabar
- cosmic
- Echo
- Empyrean
- Frigid
- Heavy
- Silver
- Solar
- Scorched
- oceanic
- ectoplasmic

### LGBT Designs
- Lesbian
- Gay
- Bi
- Trans
- Ace
- Enby
- Pan

### Thanks to
- Youunfruit for setting up the Pack
- N4ta for helping me with the Pack
- Everyone who requested a Set




### for older versions
1.20.1 is currently being supported as well. in this version crafting is not supported on fabric.
1.20.1 requirements:
- [Ravens Vanity Tags](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ravens-vanity-tags)
- [Vanity](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity-core)
